title: QA Counterfactual Descent FAIL — documents the illegal-generator failure mode that CFD_LEGAL is designed to catch
_fixture_purpose: Documented FAIL fixture (well-formed under the schema). Demonstrates the failure mode that CFD_LEGAL is designed to catch: a fixture declares a counterfactual_test_case whose path uses a generator name not in the declared_generators list (or a generator name not recognized by the validator at all). The body fields below intentionally encode such a path so a reviewer can see exactly what the CFD_LEGAL gate would have flagged. Mirrors cert [194] csm_fail_wrong_agency.json + cert [263] fail_bad_ratio.json + cert [264] fail_bad_odd_label.json convention.

counterfactual_test_cases.name: illegal_generator_used
counterfactual_test_cases.comment: Deliberately wrong: 'scalar_mult_99' is not in declared_generators={qa_step, scalar_mult_2, scalar_mult_3} AND not in the validator's _LEGAL_GENERATORS set. The successor (99, 99) is also not a valid S_9 state.

fail_ledger.message: Deliberately wrong: counterfactual_test_cases[0].path[0] uses generator 'scalar_mult_99' which is neither in declared_generators nor in the validator's legal-generator set {qa_step, scalar_mult_2, scalar_mult_3}. If result were not FAIL, the validator would emit: 'CFD_LEGAL[0]: step 0 uses generator scalar_mult_99 not in declared_generators=[qa_step, scalar_mult_2, scalar_mult_3]'.
